evidence: bpi_window() now builds map-unit annuli with independent x and y cell resolutions and require_projected(); functional_verification.csv rows annular_bpi_non_square_kernel and annular_bpi_requires_projected_crs
manuscript_safe_statement: Map-unit annular BPI now uses separate cell dimensions and rejects longitude-latitude rasters rather than treating angular units as map distances.
unresolved_boundary: The correction is an unreleased working-tree change; results must be tied to a future immutable release.

evidence: derive_bpi() uses terra::ifel(focal_sd > 0, out / focal_sd, NA); functional_verification.csv rows normalized_bpi_zero_variance bpi_partial_focal_support and vrm_partial_focal_support
manuscript_safe_statement: Normalized BPI records zero-variance or unavailable focal support as NA; BPI and VRM-style rugosity edge and missing-value support are documented.
unresolved_boundary: No complete-window or minimum-valid-cell option was added.

evidence: summarize_terrain_exact() passes coverage_fraction to apply_weighted_summary_fun(); functional_verification.csv row exact_intersection_weighted_mean
manuscript_safe_statement: With exact = TRUE, means, population standard deviations, medians, sums, and effective cell counts use positive coverage fractions; minima and maxima use positively intersected cells.
unresolved_boundary: The weighted-median convention is the implemented cumulative-coverage definition and should be retained exactly in released documentation.

evidence: zone_attributes() assigns stable identifiers to attribute-less geometries; make_isobath_corridors() records buffer_distance nominal_corridor_width and overlap_policy; functional_verification.csv rows polygon_summary_known_values polygon_summary_zone_id ramp_isobath_location corridor_nominal_width corridor_geometry_width and corridor_overlap_policy
manuscript_safe_statement: Attribute-less zones receive stable identifiers; corridor width is a one-sided buffer distance, full nominal width is twice that distance, and independently returned corridors may overlap.
unresolved_boundary: Overlapping corridor summaries are not mutually exclusive or additive.

evidence: estimate_surface_orientation() and transect outputs now include orientation_resultant_length; functional_verification.csv rows planar_transect_orientation planar_orientation_resultant transect_line_count transect_offset_spacing transect_clipping and weak_aspect_resultant
manuscript_safe_statement: Surface-derived transect orientation now carries a circular-resultant-length concentration indicator; low values flag weakly concentrated aspect directions.
unresolved_boundary: A nonzero low resultant does not make a multimodal direction scientifically reliable; users must interpret the concentration indicator.

manuscript_safe_statement: Metric metadata now give operational definitions for roughness TRI VRM-style rugosity surface-area ratio and the four-neighbor Laplacian-style index.
unresolved_boundary: The public layer name remains curvature for compatibility; it is not plan profile mean or Gaussian curvature.
